The '''Asteroid Prospector AP-300''' was a [[Capital ship/Legends|capital-size]] [[Asteroid/Legends|asteroid]] refining [[Starship/Legends|starship]] produced by [[Kuat Drive Yards/Legends|Kuat Drive Yards]]. The AP-300 was capable of [[Mining/Legends|mining]] asteroids and refining the metals found in them into high grade [[Ore/Legends|ores]]. The onboard [[Refinery/Legends|refinery]] was able to ensure the ore recovered from the asteroids was at least 25% pure.<ref name="PP">''[[Pirates & Privateers]]''</ref> Due to the dangerous environment they worked and their valuable cargo, such ships were equipped with heavy shields, a durable [[Hull/Legends|hull]], and armament of eight [[Laser cannon/Legends|laser cannons]] and four [[Tractor beam/Legends|tractor beams]]. It was meant for operations involving small to medium-sized [[Asteroid field/Legends|asteroid belts]]. [[Lant Mining Corporation]] operated these vessels as part of their mining fleet, including ''[[The Pulverizer]]'' commanded by [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Niree]].
